debug_info.goal:
case h
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ
F : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
ℓ : ℕ → ℝ
hfint : ∀ (n : ℕ), HasIntegral (f n) a b (ℓ n)
hfF : UnifConv f F
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
N n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
M : ℕ
hN : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f n x - F x| < ε / (b - a)
⊢ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε

failed_attempts:
rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  have h := abs_RiemannSum_lt hab hN
  field_simp at h
  exact h

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  have h := RiemannSum_abs_lt hab hN M
  field_simp [hab.ne.symm] at h
  exact h

rw [← RiemannSum_sub_distrib]
  have h := abs_RiemannSum_lt_of_abs_lt hab hN M
  rwa [div_mul_cancel₀ _ (by bound)] at h

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  have h := RiemannSum_abs_lt hab hN
  field_simp [hab.ne.symm] at h
  exact h

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  have h := abs_RiemannSum_le_of_abs_lt hab hN
  field_simp [by linarith] at h
  exact h

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  apply RiemannSum_abs_lt hab hN

have h := abs_RiemannSum_sub_lt hab hN
  field_simp [sub_ne_zero_of_lt hab] at h
  exact h

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  have h := RiemannSum_lt_bound hab hN
  simpa [hab.ne.symm] using h

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  simpa [hab.ne] using abs_RiemannSum_lt_of_abs_lt hab hN

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  simpa [hab.ne.symm] using RiemannSum_lt_of_abs_lt hab hN

have h := RiemannSum_diff_lt hab hN
  rwa [mul_div_cancel_left₀ _ (by bound)] at h

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  calc
    |RiemannSum (λ x, f n x - F x) a b M| ≤ RiemannSum (λ x, |f n x - F x|) a b M := abs_RiemannSum_le_RiemannSum_abs _ a b M
    _ < RiemannSum (λ x, ε / (b - a)) a b M := RiemannSum_lt hab hN
    _ = ε := by rw [RiemannSum_const]; field_simp [hab.ne]

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  have h := RiemannSum_abs_lt_of_abs_lt hab hN
  field_simp [ne_of_gt hab] at h
  exact h

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  simpa [hab.ne] using abs_RiemannSum_lt_of_abs_lt hab hN M
